name: Joseph of Arimathea
oracleText:
When Joseph of Arimathea enters the battlefield, return target creature card from your graveyard to your hand.
At the beginning of your end step, if a creature died this turn, create a 1/1 white Spirit creature token with flying.
flavorText: "And laid it in his own new tomb, which he had hewn out in the rock." — Matthew 27:60
notes: Created from a checked Messianic Fulfillment card list item; first-pass mechanics, mana, colors, and stats added. Source boundary is anchored to Luke with Matthew, Mark, and John as support material per the Biblical-series timeline guide. Classics theme art uses Albrecht Durer's "Entombment of Christ" via Wikimedia Commons.
title: Keeper of the New Tomb

classics.license: Public domain; Wikimedia Commons hosts a faithful reproduction of a public-domain work.
classics.sourceNotes: An entombment scene gives Joseph of Arimathea a strong and readable burial context.
